/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/pywgl_tabbed_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/src/main_simple.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/src/navbar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/src/icon_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/src/home_tab.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/src/editor_tab.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/src/viewer_tab.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/src/settings_tab.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/src/ics_tab.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/src/csi_tab.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/src/lsi_tab.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/src/eikos_tab.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/src/iks_tab.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/src/data_bridge.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/third_party/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/third_party/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/third_party/imgui/misc/cpp/imgui_stdlib.cpp.o CMakeFiles/pywgl_tabbed.dir/third_party/glad/src/gl.c.o -o pywgl_tabbed  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -lglfw /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 -ldl -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
